varieties.name: Bristol Fairy
varieties.traits: Height 70-100cm, double white flowers 6-7mm diameter, blue-green foliage
varieties.yield_notes: Prolific bloomer, produces masses of flowers throughout summer

varieties.name: Snowflake (Double Snowflake)
varieties.traits: Height 70-100cm, sparse grey-green foliage, semi-double and double white flowers
varieties.yield_notes: Hundreds of tiny white flowers per stem, profuse summer bloomer
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection, Chiltern Seeds, Harris Seeds, Thompson & Morgan

varieties.name: Perfekta
varieties.traits: Height 90cm, white double flowers 12mm diameter (larger than Bristol Fairy)
varieties.yield_notes: High production, commercial cut flower quality

varieties.name: Festival Star
varieties.traits: Compact 30-45cm height, tight mounded habit, grey-green foliage
varieties.yield_notes: Incredibly long blooming, tidy uniform plants throughout season

varieties.name: Flamingo
varieties.traits: Height 100-120cm, bushy habit, grey-green sparse foliage
varieties.yield_notes: Rich pink hazy clouds, 50cm-1m wide cloud of blooms

varieties.name: Rosenschleier (Rosy Veil)
varieties.origin: European hybrid (G. paniculata x G. repens), long European favorite
varieties.traits: Compact 30-40cm height, semi-evergreen, mounding bushy habit, narrow grey-green leaves
varieties.yield_notes: Frothy mounds 90cm across, dense flowering, airy clouds

varieties.name: Compacta Plena
varieties.traits: Height 45-60cm, compact bushy growth, blue-green foliage

varieties.name: Pink Fairy
varieties.yield_notes: Prolific bloomer, clouds of pink, best planted in groups of 3+

varieties.name: Viette's Dwarf
varieties.traits: Compact 30-38cm height, mound-forming, blue-green sparse foliage
varieties.availability: North American nurseries, limited in Australia

varieties.name: Covent Garden (Covent Garden Market)
varieties.origin: Europe, named after London's famous flower market, cultivated since early 1900s
varieties.traits: Height 45-60cm, upright plant, lacy cloud-like green foliage
varieties.yield_notes: Quick growing (9-12 weeks to flower), profuse bloomer, 5-6 weeks bloom period per sowing

varieties.name: Rosea
varieties.origin: Europe, pink selection of G. elegans
varieties.yield_notes: Quick growing, sprays of pink flowers, good cut flower

varieties.name: Monarch White
varieties.yield_notes: Flowers in 10 weeks from sowing, 6+ months flowering if succession sown

varieties.name: Alba (Gypsophila repens)
varieties.traits: Prostrate growth 10-20cm height, spreads 30-60cm, mat-forming, blue-tinted foliage
varieties.yield_notes: Profuse masses of blooms covering foliage mat

varieties.name: Rosea (Gypsophila repens)
varieties.traits: Creeping habit 10-15cm height, spreads 45cm, grey-green foliage
varieties.availability: European alpine nurseries, Garden Express (temperate regions)

varieties.name: Covent Garden (Gypsophila elegans)
varieties.availability: International seed import required - not available from tropical monsoon climates nurseries
